core.notes: Stable command descriptors, begin/end action attributes, shortcut option metadata, keyboard, mouse, and scroll shortcut resolution, configurable shortcut overrides, command hints, repeat suppression, auto-clear sidedef texture toggle action, and menu/toolbar availability synchronization are implemented. Full UDB action manager parity remains incomplete.

Compiler and nodebuilder configuration metadata is parsed, including recursive cfg discovery and UDB-style first-definition wins behavior for duplicate compiler names. Nodebuilder `%FI` and `%FO` argument substitution, compiler support-file resolution and staging, UDB-style nodebuilder process start settings, and UDB-style nodebuilder process result handling are covered. ACC-style `%FI`, `%FO`, `%FS`, `%PT`, and `%PS` script compiler argument substitution, UDB-style directory and archive script compile planning, ACS map-script and external-library compile preflight checks, ACS include resolution and temp-directory copying, UDB-style ACC and BCC process start settings, compiler temporary-input error remapping, ACS include error source resolution, ACC, BCC, and ZT-BCC compiler error line parsing including temporary path cleanup, and UDB-style script compiler error list formatting and de-duplication are covered. Full nodebuilder execution, script compiler execution, and editor integration remain incomplete.

Game configuration parsing and thing catalog metadata are partial. Script configuration loading, exact UDB script type name parsing, UDB-style script type detection, UDB-style script navigator entries, UDB-style script configuration selection rules, script snippet loading, map-lump script configuration resolution, script lexer keyword set preparation, script autocomplete entry preparation, function calltip argument tracking, calltip argument highlighting, and static-limit defaults plus visplane interpolation are covered. Recent actor merge parity includes locked sprites, bright and dynamic light recalculation, blocking severity preservation, UDB stuck-inside error checks for solid actors, non-solid error-check preservation, DistanceCheck preservation for undefined CVARs, unknown preview sprite fallback, MAPINFO DoomEdNums overrides from archived unsupported actors, and explicit-category-only replacement recategorization.

Avalonia editor controls cover the main shell, menus, toolbar, status area with active game configuration, settings, shortcuts, recent files, error/status history, auto-clear sidedef texture toggle, selection groups, map markers, custom fields, basic property dialogs, explicit selected-element Properties command, Insert at Cursor toolbar access, UDB-style script document tab identity with persisted view settings, script compiler error routing by tab type, and script tab title updates. Full UDB control set parity remains incomplete.

Resource list serialization, WAD, PK3 and directory resources including ignored path filters, nested PK3, mixed priority stack, palette lookup, default gray PLAYPAL fallback, nearest PLAYPAL color lookup, ARGB-to-index quantization, indexed image generation, colormap, sprite, texture, flat, hires, voxel, model discovery behavior, UDB-style script find-usages matching, and script resource identity with resource-scoped usage results have focused coverage. Full UDB DataManager parity remains incomplete.
Patch data model, thing parsing, frame parsing, sprite replacements, parser behavior, and thing catalog merge support exist. Full UDB baseline DehackedData table processing remains incomplete.

Selection conversion, duplicate, copy helpers, marked-geometry cloning with virtual sectors, virtual-sector cleanup preservation, paste tag remapping for tag-typed action arguments, stitching, merge geometry mode, tag helpers, owner-specific tag allocation, format-aware tag searches/statistics/replacement and next-free-tag allocation including tag-typed action arguments, tag statistics label editing, named flags, custom fields, UDB-style things filter validation, format-aware things filter criteria, UDB-style withdraw-undo and grouped undo behavior, custom things filter draft write-back, custom filter list management, connected wall texture auto-alignment, texture-fit offset wrapping, and several edit-mode surfaces are covered. Full UDB editing mode parity remains incomplete.

Editor startup, window placement, dirty-state prompts, reload, close, autosave recovery, recent files and maps, UDB-style numbered recent menu presentation, status history, error logs, update-check replacement, file conflict checks, before/after command launch plans, UDB-style nodebuilder output validation, UDB-style auto-clear sidedef texture preference persistence, UDB-style Test Map token expansion, and Test Map skill menu modeling are covered. Full UDB application orchestration remains incomplete.

Focused parity exists for point-in-polygon, Hermite spline helpers, thing absolute-Z calculation, thing-to-line alignment, sector linedef orientation flipping, sidedef lightfog maintenance, sector fade color selection, flat and wall texture floodfill, explicit-end closest path tracing, marked action and tag tools, config-aware sidedef Y-offset normalization, triangulation-based sector label positions, linedef measurement, nearest vertex, linedef and thing queries, snapping, map-wide range wrappers, blockmap traversal, and selected geometry stitching helpers. Full trace paths, curve tools, triangulation, frustum behavior, broader label placement, and validation remain incomplete.
The editor shell exposes 2D and 3D mode entry points, toolbar/menu wiring, shortcuts, and visual-mode scaffolding. Full GZBuilder visual editing behavior remains incomplete.

Doom, Hexen, and UDMF map loading and writing have focused compatibility coverage, including invalid element filtering, unsigned binary fields, UDMF block and field order, custom fields, stream facades, map conversion, and PK3/WAD resource IO. Directory and PK3 resource options expose root textures and flats like UDB, and nested directory WAD high-resolution replacements participate in priority order. Classic texture composition honors UDB patch offset compatibility flags and WAD patch fallback ordering around flat ranges. Full universal IO parity remains incomplete.

Map model coverage includes element collections, map options, grid setup persistence, grid background scale limits, selection groups, marks, tags, argument handling, custom UDMF field name validation, property copying, clone and clipboard snapshots, binary format cleanup, blockmap population, UDB-style sidedef unused texture cleanup, map-level sidedef texture cleanup, and several geometry mutation helpers. Full UDB MapSet behavior remains incomplete.

Basic thing, linedef, sector, sidedef, UDMF flag, custom field, map marker, map options, and namespace dialogs are present, including linedef sidedef texture fields, sector flat fields, and selected linedef, thing, sector, and sidedef UDMF flag editing. Full UDB property panel and field editor parity remains incomplete.

2D map rendering, grid display, UDB-style bounded grid stepping, textured previews, sprite and thing previews, camera texture image handling, dynamic bitmap images, unknown images, voxel image discovery, large-map 3D performance guards, visual vertex handle model coverage for floor/ceiling height fallback and handle bounds, visual slope handle local mesh and placement-basis coverage, UDMF comment icon render planning for linedefs, sectors, and things, UDB-style pixel color and indexed color collection defaults, and image brightness color-correction tables have coverage. Full UDB renderer and visual mode rendering parity remains incomplete.

WAD, PK3, nested PK3, directory, mixed stack, texture, flat, patch, sprite, hires, voxel, model, camera texture, dynamic bitmap, unknown image, nested WAD folder-resource and hires priority, and cache invalidation behavior have focused coverage. Full lazy loading, advanced namespace behavior, and UDB DataManager parity remain incomplete.

Game configuration types, thing metadata, argument render metadata, map format flags, texture definitions, and ZDoom data structures are partially modeled. Full UDB type system parity remains incomplete.

Mode switching, 3D entry, selected geometry editing surfaces, command shortcuts, status hints, rendering scaffolding, visual vertex handle floor/ceiling pair modeling, explicit height-offset state, adjacent-sector height fallback, visual slope sidedef and vertex handle placement and pivot models, UDB-style slope handle height-change plane application, visual culling deduplication, and culled 3D thing billboard drawing exist. Full UDB visual mode tools and interaction behavior remain incomplete.

Main window, dialogs for open map, settings, shortcuts, status history, errors, autosave recovery, selection groups, custom fields, map markers, and map options are present. Full UDB window and docking system parity remains incomplete.

DECORATE and ZScript parsers cover many actor metadata, state preview, goto, user variable, region, DoomEdNum, DamageType, DECORATE include validation, DECORATE state cast validation, DECORATE user-variable validation, inherited user-variable shadow validation, ZScript include validation, ZScript preprocessor validation, ZScript top-level version declarations, ZScript top-level const validation, ZScript top-level enum validation, ZScript top-level struct validation, ZScript top-level identifier validation, ZScript class body terminator validation, ZScript duplicate class and mixin validation, ZScript fatal final and sealed inheritance constraints, ZScript actor and mixin self-inheritance rejection, ZScript mixin parent validation, ZScript mixin user-variable default behavior, ZScript mixin size-default behavior, ZScript extension size-default behavior, ZScript extension ordering validation, ZScript extended Spawn inheritance, and actor merge behaviors, including MAPINFO DoomEdNums overrides from archived unsupported actors. TEXTURES, MODELDEF, SNDINFO, SNDSEQ, TERRAIN, LOCKDEFS, DECALDEF, VOXELDEF, IWADINFO, CVARINFO, REVERBS, X11 RGB, MAPINFO, ZMAPINFO, and GLDEFS all have focused parser coverage. TEXTURES includes default-scale composition metadata, UDB-style Graphic skipping, UDB-style unknown declaration consumption, namespace-specific duplicate handling, and UDB-order patch flip/rotation transforms. MODELDEF validates supported model file extensions and non-negative model-related indexes. GLDEFS covers lights, objects, glow metadata, skyboxes, includes, invalid declaration abort behavior, and unknown structure handling. Full actor semantics, model rendering, voxel rendering, and broader ZDoom data integration remain incomplete.
DBuilder uses a cross-platform Silk.NET OpenGL rendering abstraction. Full UDB native OpenGL parity remains incomplete.

plugins.notes: GZDoom 3D floor data resolution, multi-tag target matching, managed UDMF control-sector filtering, selected-sector floor discovery, shared-floor filtering, display toggles, control-sector edit snapshots, control-sector mutation, orphan action-line cleanup, mode/action metadata, command catalog entries, control-sector area settings, custom tag range allocation, control-sector area placement planning, control-sector geometry materialization, action-line binding, slope vertex group persistence, slope data-sector fields, floor/ceiling plane application, selected slope vertex editing, sector plane binding helpers, draw-slope acceptance, group allocation, selected-sector binding, and data-sector persistence exist. Full 3DFloorMode save-back, editor window, slope drawing UI, and slope editing UI remain incomplete.

UDB-style automap model exists for line visibility, Doom/Hexen/Strife color presets, line color classification, secret-sector detection, lock-color resolution, format-aware UDMF and classic automap linedef flag handling, selected linedef secret/dontdraw flag toggles, selected sector textured-hidden automap flag toggles, mode metadata, persisted setting defaults, presentation layer descriptors, valid-linedef collection, highlight target planning, render planning for line draw order, highlight colors, and textured-background fallback, editor Automap Mode rendering with UDB-style valid-line colors and textured-sector visibility, hover highlighting, click toggles for highlighted line and sector automap flags, and toolbar-backed persisted show-hidden-lines, show-secret-sectors, show-locks, show-textures, and color-preset options. Full plugin lifecycle and docked workflow remain incomplete.

Blockmap construction, queries, editor overlay toggles, raw BLOCKMAP lump parsing, shared block-list queries, questionable offset helpers, missing-line counts, malformed lump diagnostics, parsed BLOCKMAP highlighted-block/shared-list/questionable-offset overlays, and a non-modal Blockmap Explorer summary/block-list window exist. Full mode workflow and docked workflow remain incomplete.

Selected map effect helpers exist, including slope and 3D floor related behavior. UDB-style jitter transform helpers exist for vertices, sector floor and ceiling heights, and things, including safe-distance clamping, offset modes, angle snapping, height offsets, pitch, roll, and scale. UDB-style directional shading calculations exist for sectors and sidedefs, including cached initial lights, absolute light handling, sun-angle vectors, and sector lightcolor fields. UDB-style Wavefront OBJ terrain parsing, triangular sector geometry building, and current-map editor import command exist, including axis conversion, face filtering, shared edges, selected output, and vertex-height support. Full BuilderEffects plugin UI remains incomplete.

Core edit modes, draw mode surfaces, persisted draw-mode option keys and defaults, persisted edit-selection precise-position and height-adjust option keys and defaults, UDB-style edit-selection arbitrary rotation, rotation snapping, sector height adjustment, non-uniform scaling, and mirrored-linedef flipping, undo/redo panel timeline modeling with current-row selection, elision, and multi-level operation planning, draw-mode subdivision and curve segment adjustment helpers, rectangle and ellipse draw-shape planning with bevel, spikiness, hints, and editor box-drag materialization, draw-mode thing placement from generated rectangle, ellipse, and curve vertices, selected-sector floor, ceiling, brightness, UDMF floor/ceiling light, and light/fade color gradient commands, UDMF selected-linedef brightness gradient command, gradient interpolation mode selection, curve and grid editor materialization from persisted draw settings, draw-grid geometry planning and editor box-drag materialization, selected-linedef curve defaults, point generation, and materialization, sector drawing defaults from map override options, selection conversion, stitching, filters, select-similar property matching and active-mode menu command, single-surface and connected-surface UDMF sidedef texture fit field calculation, UDMF flat alignment to selected linedef sides, plus selected-linedef editor fitting, bridge line-chain validation, shape planning, and editor selected-chain materialization, slope arch plane calculation and editor selected-sector floor arch command, visual vertex slope smart pivot and adjacent-handle selection helpers, visual slope command metadata, Make Door sector mutation behavior and editor selected-sector command, legacy object export settings defaults, scale and texture options, and path validation, image export settings for format, pixel depth, scale, tiles, brightmaps, transparency, default output paths, bounds, tile counts, output-name planning, progress item accounting, sector selection, empty-map warning behavior, plugin setting persistence keys, and completion result messages, Wavefront export sector-selection preflight, plugin setting persistence keys, settings, form enablement state, validation, material naming, OBJ coordinate formatting helpers, MTL content, actor code content, MODELDEF content, export path helpers, surface optimization, OBJ geometry assembly, file planning, planned-file writes, material image planning, PNG image writes, idStudio export settings, idStudio form defaults and texture-count labels, idStudio map-name validation, idStudio refmap hierarchy writing, idStudio func/static entity headers, idStudio vertex, vector, plane, brush entity formatting, idStudio floor and ceiling brush formatting, idStudio wall brush formatting, idStudio stepclip brush formatting, idStudio texture art and material declaration planning, idStudio uncompressed BGRA TGA encoding, idStudio map-used wall texture and flat collection, idStudio linedef wall and step brush traversal, idStudio sector floor and ceiling brush traversal, idStudio geometry refmap file-plan orchestration, idStudio combined geometry and texture export planning, idStudio editor command and resource-backed texture export integration, empty-space thing placement, and error-check surfaces are partially represented. Find/replace includes within-current-selection scoping, UDB-style replace availability rules, basic numeric, tag, texture, and flat categories plus UDB-style element index, sector height, sector brightness comparison prefixes, any-effect matching, generalized sector effect matching, explicit sidedef texture slot, sector flat slot, wildcard texture and flat matching, combined texture-or-flat wildcard search, thing angle, comma-separated thing type lists, linedef and thing action-with-arguments with any-action and named script arg0str matching, generalized linedef action bit matching, linedef, sidedef, sector, and thing flags, linedef, sector, and thing tag categories, linedef and thing action-argument reference categories, and wildcard UDMF field categories for any, vertex, linedef, sidedef, sector, and thing fields. TagRange includes range calculation, form state, stored defaults, toolbar availability, and no-selection warning behavior. Map error checking includes UDB-style fix actions for stray vertices, off-grid vertices, overlapping vertices, vertices overlapping linedefs, missing textures, unknown textures, unused textures, unused thing default flags, missing flats, unknown flats, missing-front linedefs, sidedness flag mismatches, thing deletion error results, unknown thing script deletion, unknown action and sector effect removals, action-driven lower texture checks for floor lower/raise specials, 3D floor texture requirements, Plane_Align missing-texture suppression, Static_Init sky-transfer texture handling, required-slot texture alignment checks, UDB-style sky-flat upper texture suppression, context-independent fractional-coordinate off-grid checks, UDMF-only zero-length-inclusive short-linedef checks, UDB map-size, overlapping linedef, empty/unclosed/invalid sector, stray and overlapping vertex, missing-sidedef and sidedness mismatch, missing/unknown/unused/misaligned texture and flat, missing-activation, unknown linedef-script, unknown action/effect, stuck-thing, unknown/obsolete/unused thing, and polyobject diagnostics, invalid-sector dissolve fixes, per-element ignored error-check suppression, selected-result description copy, and selected-result ignore, show-all, select-type, and type-filter UI. Full mode set, edit-selection transform panel workflow, docked undo/redo panel UI, legacy object export geometry writer, image export rendering and UI command integration, slope arch UI handle workflow, select-similar options UI, Wavefront visual-sector collection, export UI command integration, remaining find/replace object types, remaining error result fixes, and docked tooling remain incomplete.

UDB-style RGB/HSV conversion, picker display formatting, typed HEX and float color input parsing, packed UDMF color integers, sector lightcolor/fadecolor field behavior, separate sector color field drafts, selected-sector editor color command, and dynamic light picker metadata, color storage, slider labels, control visibility, slider limits, and radius/interval mutation rules exist. Full color picker controls and dynamic light editor UI wiring remain incomplete.

UDB-style comment grouping over vertex, linedef, sidedef, sector, and thing UDMF fields exists, including current-mode filtering, set/remove helpers, selection targets with sector boundary propagation, edit targets with sidedef-to-linedef conversion, padded square view-area calculation, UDB-style comment icon render planning, toggle command metadata, and a non-modal editor comments panel for setting selected-element comments, selecting groups, and removing grouped comments. Full docked UI, live selection wiring, and renderer integration remain incomplete.

An editor Image Example mode renders an overlay-only screen-space image like the UDB sample mode. It is wired as a built-in Tools menu command until the full plugin loader and embedded-resource sample plugin workflow exist.

Nodebuilder lump validation, related IO helpers, and UDB-style classic NODES/SEGS/VERTEXES/SSECTORS data parsing exist, including BSP child flags, parent links, seg angles, vertices, subsectors, seg-to-subsector links, classic subsector polygon clipping for visualization, classic subsector hit testing by BSP traversal plus polygon containment, and editor subsector overlay rendering. UDB-supported ZNODES headers are recognized, and compressed or uncompressed ZNODES payload extraction exists. A non-modal editor Nodes Viewer shows classic parser status plus node, seg, and subsector summaries. Full ZNODES structure parsing and full NodesViewer visualization UI remain incomplete.

Reject table IO coverage exists, including UDB-style REJECT lump validation, highlighted-sector visibility relation classification for default, highlighted, bidirectional, and one-way overlay states, default overlay color settings and relation color mapping, highlighted-sector overlay rendering, and a non-modal editor window for validation, relation summaries, rejected-sector selection, and sector navigation. Full color configuration UI and complete mode workflow remain incomplete.

Sound propagation reachability helpers, UDB-style domain grouping, adjacent-domain expansion across one sound-blocking boundary, block-line tracking, non-ambush hunting thing filtering, editor command wiring, UDMF blocksound reachability, format-aware linedef sound-blocking toggles, highlighted-domain sector overlay rendering, leak path search model, red leak path overlay rendering from two selected sectors, default overlay colors, rotating domain color palette, and Sound Environment thing grouping with zone-boundary, dormant, name, id, and color rules exist. Full mode UI, color configuration UI, Sound Environment docker UI, and plugin workflow remain incomplete.

Stair building helpers, editor command surfaces, UDB-style accept-path option application for one-based height stepping, distinct base heights, flats, required wall texture filling, and upper/lower unpegged flags, plus straight linedef geometry planning with front/back side and spacing, connected single-step straight stair planning, distinct-sector post-line planning and materialization, curved stair geometry planning, Catmull-Rom spline stair geometry planning, straight stair sector materialization, Stair Sector Builder mode and Select Sectors Outline command metadata, outline selection helper, prefab settings key model, prefab collection settings shape, numeric prefab settings load ordering, prefab name suggestion, reserved-name, overwrite and insert-position behavior, form startup state for default prefabs, available tabs and selected-sector overrides, and loaded-prefab option mapping exist. Editor prefab UI persistence and preview workflow remain incomplete.

Tag listing and reveal surfaces exist. UDB-style tag explorer entry filtering, sorting, grouped tree shaping, thing category grouping in index view, configured action and effect labels in action grouping, generalized sector effect expansion in action grouping, and export text shaping models exist for tags, actions, comments, and polyobjects. A non-modal editor Tag Explorer exposes grouped display mode, sort mode, special-token search, comments-only filtering, row navigation, and text export. Full docked live UI behavior remains incomplete.

UDB-style absolute and relative tag range calculation exists, including duplicate detection, skip-used handling, out-of-range reporting, selected element initial-tag capture, selected element assignment, in-session step and relative-mode defaults, form title, end-tag preview and warning state, and editor menu/toolbar form integration for sectors, linedefs, and things. Full plugin lifecycle and docked workflow remain incomplete.

UDB-style USDF availability gating on configured DIALOGUE map lumps exists, along with DIALOGUE map-lump reads from direct WAD maps and PK3-embedded WAD maps, plus a typed parser for includes, conversations, pages, ifitem conditions, choices, costs, messages, specials, args, and navigation fields. Dialog editor action metadata, toolbar/menu item metadata, and UDB-style window setting keys are modeled. A non-modal editor USDF conversation window shows parsed DIALOGUE content. Editing commands, include lump resolution, and save-back workflow remain incomplete.

UDB-style VisplaneExplorer 64x64 tile model exists, including progressive butterfly sampling order, point result sentinels, packed visplanes/drawsegs/solidsegs/openings counters, UDB stat compression, heatmap byte interpolation from configured visplane static limits, palette row storage, heatmap palette selection, void-color overrides, tile coordinate flooring, view-prioritized scan queueing, map-bound tile creation with one-sided outside-tile culling, NODES preflight checks for missing, empty, and ZDBSP node lumps, tile hover value labels with overflow markers, custom view-height input normalization, mode/action metadata, and toolbar settings state for open doors, heatmap, and view height. Native VPO execution, editor overlay rendering, and full UI remain incomplete.

UDB-style WadAuthorMode hover highlight model exists for vertex/thing/linedef/sector priority, highlight ranges, renderer scale handling, side-based sector selection from the nearest linedef, linedef popup command order, mode enter/leave selection behavior, edit-mode descriptor, `wadauthormode` action metadata, editor menu and toolbar toggle, hover highlight rendering, and linedef popup execution for properties, delete, split, flip, and default curve materialization. Full plugin workflow remains incomplete.
